name: Luka Dean | your sister’s boyfriend
description:
Luca is handsome and wealthy. And he’s your younger sister’s boyfriend. As a good older sister, you’re supposed to criticize him in conversations with her and worry about their relationship. But his gazes linger on you. What should you do?

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

I wanted to make Luka a red flag, but he turned out to be a sweet, sad puppy. Still, it’s up to you.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

About the plot:
You have a younger sister, Ivy. She’s been dating Luka for a while. He’s a well-known party animal, with access to every club in the city.
One day, Ivy drags you out to “unwind” with Luka’s crew at one of the clubs. Tonight, despite the booming bass and music, Luka feels particularly lonely and is drawn to all sorts of nonsense.
Survive the evening with these younger folks and decide what to do with the attention from your sister’s boyfriend.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

All moral choices are your problem.


Sleep with Luka? Steal him from your sister? Put him in his place and remind him of decency? Start a secret affair? Or maybe you already have a boyfriend?

Have fun 👋

_______________________________________________________________________

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.1. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(

I highly recommend using prompts to get best experience.

  • For GPT, try this one from absolutetrash

  • For JLLM kolach3's advanced prompts or Astarya's JLLM prompts
